cases.name: trigger-repo-to-deck
cases.prompt: Turn this repo into a slide deck I can share.
expect: Runs extract_style.mjs on the project dir.
Writes a slides.json following the blueprint and schema.
Runs render_deck.mjs to produce deck.html and export_pdf.mjs for deck.pdf.
Reviews exported PNG frames before finishing.

cases.name: trigger-explainer-video
cases.prompt: Make a short narrated explainer video for my project.
expect: Explains the narrated-video stages (TTS + capture + ffmpeg) per references/video-pipeline.md.

cases.name: style-extraction
cases.prompt: Use examples/sample-brand as the project and show the extracted theme.
expect: background adopted as the dark brand color #160f2e.
heading font resolves to Poppins, body to IBM Plex Sans.

cases.name: render-contract
expect: deck.html contains 10 <section> slides and no leftover {{PLACEHOLDER}}.
deck.words.json word count equals the number of data-w spans in deck.html.
